title: Farmers-Market
description: A small weapon content mod for 1.20.1, made to give more choices to pvp with including two swords, and axe, an shovel, and a totem variant
body:
Farmers Market is a small pvp orented content mod which adds four weapons to add some variaty to combat, the greatsword, the rapier, the bloodhound axe, and the hexspade, intended to be used with enchancements, but are all suitable for vanilla non the less with small changes to their stats and included right clicks to influcnce the flow of battle.
included in this is a totem of undying varient that can be used on command when under 7 hearts for the full effect, or when under 3 hearts for a weaker effect
